action.description:
Introduced by Representatives Arney, Goodwin, Haywood, Madison, Moore Omokunde, Rivera-Wagner, Stubbs, Taylor, Bare, Cruz, Fitzgerald, Hong, Joers, Mayadev, Miresse, Neubauer, Prado, Roe, Sinicki, Snodgrass, Tenorio, Udell and Sheehan; 
cosponsored by Senators Drake, L. Johnson, Carpenter, Dassler-Alfheim, Hesselbein, Larson, Ratcliff, Roys, Smith, Spreitzer, Wirch, Keyeski and Habush Sinykin
